esc.source: IPART 'Relevant information for scheme participants' spreadsheet, 13 January 2026 (column F — Scheme Penalty Rate, $AUD per ESC)
esc.note: ESS scheme penalty rate per certificate. Base penalty rate (column E) is CPI-adjusted annually under clause 15 of Schedule 4A to the Electricity Supply Act 1995 (NSW), then multiplied by the energy conversion factor (~0.94 from 2016 onwards) to produce the scheme penalty rate (column F). Values below are the IPART-confirmed scheme penalty rates.
esc.verification_status: VERIFIED — all rates sourced from IPART spreadsheet 'Relevant-information-for-scheme-participants-13-January-2026.XLSX', column F (Scheme Penalty Rate). Verified 7 April 2026.

veec.source: Essential Services Commission of Victoria / Victorian Energy Efficiency Target Regulations 2018
veec.note: VEEC shortfall penalty per certificate under the Victorian Energy Upgrades program
veec.verification_status: VERIFIED — ESC confirmed $90 for 2024, Victorian Government confirmed $100 for 2026
